reviews.review_text: 2 nd time we stayed here. 1st time was an ensuite site for caravan/camper site. Ensuite bathroom was super clean an well maintained can't recommend it highly enough. Only thing office hrs they could open a lil earlier like 8-5 but ya got after hrs lock box an they only a call away to let ya in. Felt safe during our stay will return to checkout Capricorn coast.

Was very clean and tidy
Was close to amenities
Price was very good
Would recommend for any one to go visit
Pet friendly
Alles super!

Rundum schöner Campingplatz!
Saubere Küche, alles top

Stayed 3 nights, we enjoyed the stay but think a few things are worth pointing out.

Deluxe powered site area was great but do be aware there is a dog in a yard that backs onto the sites that barks all night long.

The park overall seems a bit tired, ensuite sites are all lumpy and not much grass. Water park could defiantly use some love.

Nothing that wouldn’t stop us staying again

I cannot describe the day I had before booking here, I'm a local and had a day from hell. When I called, I had a little rant and cry and she booked my room instantly and told me to be on my way. When I got there I was greeted by the most beautiful staff. Who had heard about my sook and took it apon themselves to go completely above and beyond, in kindness, hospitality and human to human connection, after another cry and as many thank yous as I could muster, I went to my room and was shocked on how clean, homely and beautiful my room was, full of towels and cosy blankets. I didn't have the  ask for a single thing, even with my two kids on my hip. My toddler is autistic, and very uncomfortable in new places, this was fun, inviting and exciting, I didn't expect him to sleep, he did! Even my 6 month old had a comfortable night sleep, I cannot recommend this place enough, and if I every need somewhere to go, I'm going here. Thank you again, to everyone there. I appreciate everything so much.
Alles super, wir waren positiv überrascht, Pool war sehr groß und sauber. Zimmer sind klug gestaltet, Terrasse ist auch vorhanden. Jederzeit wieder.

We spent a week here for a family holiday and absolutely loved it. Spacious rooms. Water park was a hit!! Location was perfect. Rockhampton allowed us to slow down in our life compared to Brisbane ! It was just what we needed. The park itself was well maintained and clean and beautiful! We had a blast!!!!
Parents don’t be afraid to have a slide and join in the fun! You won’t regret laughing alongside your babies.
Excellent spot for unwinding. Excellent client care. Wonderful facilities. The cleanliness is excellent and the personnel are incredibly polite.
Great location near Rocky city and activities.

I would give 1 star for this place. No WiFi to cabins as stated as a park feature. Cabins have marks on walls and blinds. Skirting isn't clean. Mould in bathroom drain. Maintenance guy is very stand-offish and accusatory. Don't call him dude because his ego can't handle it. I would not recommend staying here. The ladies at reception are lovely enough for first point of contact. Anything beyond that is a complete waste of your money.

We have stayed here on powered sites /ensuited sites few  times over the last 4 years but have to admit this stay was hassle free and our site was unreal 👏👏👏..First time ever we've been offered the sites up near camp kitchen 😀 they are just lovely very roomy easy to access and just so inviting 😀.will add pics so you can see 🤗.Thanx to staff for all amenities laundry n grounds being A1 +++

Wir haben nur eine Nacht in Rockhampton übernachtet und mussten dann bereits weiter. Wir waren sehr zufrieden. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sehr sauber und die Camp Küche war auch sauber und man kommte gut kochen. Das WLAN funktionierte nicht sehr gut hnd beim Abreisen wurde nicht gefragt wie man den Aufenthalt bei Ihnen empfunden hat dies ist etwas schaade ansonsten gut. Hat tolle Pools.
Amenity block was a long way from caravan site.

We have stayed at this park numerous times and the Staff are wonderful , they always go above and beyond to ensure guest are happy. All the rooms are clean and tidy . Our son also loves this park because of the waterpark and fun activities . It’s in a Very handy location that is close to everything and also reasonable pricing . Perfect for families . We will definitely recommend and be back again .
Jeff and Mikayla Morad

Very disappointed with my experience. The customer service was extremely poor. I asked to extend my stay and was refused without any explanation or reason. No information was given about what had occurred or why my stay could not be extended, which felt very unprofessional and unfair.

On top of that, the cabin had an unpleasant smell, which made the stay uncomfortable. Overall, the lack of communication, poor service, and hygiene issues made this a very negative experience. I will definitely not be staying here again and would not recommend this place to others.

This is a really great park for families. We stayed a few nights on our travels and the kids loved the waterpark and nice roads to ride their bikes. The pools are great. The entire place is very clean and the staff polite and helpful. We recommend for all.

Congrats team good work.
Good
Clean rooms, spacious, heaps for kids to do, great location
Great place to stay. Kids loved the water park and pools.

We needed a last-minute booking on Boxing Day, and Greg went above and beyond to help us secure a site, store our van, and make everything run smoothly. He was incredibly helpful and friendly.

We’ve now visited the park twice, and Greg has been absolutely fantastic both times. All the staff have been incredible. Thanks to them, Discovery Rockhampton has become our favourite place to stop.

Regards,
Tyla & Matt Morris

Amazing park with 2 pools and splash park, tenniscourt, camp kitchen, kids park, spotless amenities. Manicured lawn and garden areas, a variety of cabins available. Very patient and friendly staff on hand to try to assist with your evey need
Nice clean rooms,and a lot of fun for the kids

What an awesome place to stay. Highly recommended. Awesome for a get away for the kids with a pretty cool waterpark there to.
Friendly staff and comfy beds
Tout était top. Les emplacements du camping, l’accueil, la cuisines, la piscine et les douches
Nice quiet van park with clean amenities aka ensuite site. Love staying here.
Veel ruimte voor de motorhome. Zeer schone wc's en douches. In de avond zitten er heel veel vogels. Vriendelijk personeel en ook een mooie ruimte en schoon om de afwas te doen of om te koken
Good doing business

Great stay. Good size sites, tennis courts and a few of pools, one of which is a splash park. 20 minute walk to Stockland Mall, bottle shop directly opposite. Also a bus stop where you can get a bus into Rocky City close by. If you are arriving over the weekend with kids be aware that locals can get day passes to use the pools and the weekend we arrived it was pretty busy. Staff super helpful and always smiling.

Nice holiday park with generous sized van sites, some camping areas and quite a few cabins
There’s a pool and a splash park plus a tennis court and basketball hoops
Convenient to the city and shopping
Large well presented property,

This is our second stay at Discovery Parks Rockhampton and highly recommend. The people here are so lovely, its a very relaxed atmosphere and location wise it is super central to all your shops etc the splash park and pools on site are awesome too. The kids and I love staying here.
Powered site, great location, friendly staff.
Very convenient location for vanners to lay up and make running repairs. King's, Repco and Battery World across the road, Mitre 10 not far away and Stocklands shopping centre nearby.

Great spot..especially if you have children!!
Pools galore
Great place for kids

Beau camping.
Rien à proximité du camping, c’est dommage …
Wonderful place to stay.

Was told that we had to use an ensuite site due to the size of our van, after a 3 day stay in watched large sites unused. The only conclusion is they took the opportunity to unsellable us, won't be returning
Very clean caravan park with good size sites and friendly staff

A great park, can be a little crowded in the peak season, no suprise. They offer a variety of accommodation from cabins to caravan sites. We stayed in a luxury van site with a fire pit lighting and larger site. Amenities were clean. Realy enjoyed the stay

Older park. Caravan site was very unlevel, on a hill. Cement slabs not tyre friendly.
Heard they are putting cabins in this particular area. Probably a good option.
Location and services good. However more security cameras could be helpful as theft was our experience . So extra caution required , especially overnight ! we didn’t think opportunists were lurking.
Very old and shabby not up to today's standard of parks mold and broken blinds above bed  not a nice place
Excellent customer service rooms well Equipped.
Good for short stay. Nice van sites. Close to center of town.
Stayed one night in. Motorhome. Large site close to  couple takeaway shops for dinner. Amenities bit dated but had grab rails in shower and toilet. Only Luke warm shower at 7pm.
Amazing park with water slides, activities room and two pools (not heated)
We stayed at a powered site with our campervan. Even though the park is in the city, it‘s pretty quiet. The amenities were clean and the staff super friendly.

Nice place to stay.
Great water park for kids
Nice park, $51 powered site. Unfortunately it really was hard to get our van on the two strips of concrete.  The poor man next to us also struggled even with the help of people.
Loved it was really comfortable. People were nice . Would have no trouble recommending it to any travellers. 😎🤠👍🙏🌄
Great place to stay everyone very helpful and friendly

A nice clean caravan park.
Only gripe being WiFi performance.
Smart TV couldn't connect. Smart phones connect easily but slow performance.

We stayed for 4 nights. Very handy to service stations, in between 2 shopping centres. Even though on the Bruce Highway, there's not much traffic noise. Plenty for families to do in the park. All facilities we used were A1. Caravan sites were large and comfortable.
Staff very friendly and gave great service from the phone call to book till the see you later.
We stard for a week for qld touch comp. The kids were kept busy with the basketball hoop, the water park and riding their bikes around. The fire pots were great! Everything was super clean ans tidy.
Great park large close to shops had a great camp kitchen
We had Beachfront site B5. Direct views of the laundry, beach and the islands. Fantastic site. Have been here before and will come again.

Paid $380 a night for a very old run down cabin that was not renovated. It smelt very bad inside. One small couch, it was so small the family couldn’t fit on it and the smallest TV I had seen. Cupboards in kitchen falling off the hinge, the cabin needed maintenance. The beds had ants in there so of course the kids did not want to sleep in the bed. The cabin was in a very poor location with heavy traffic constantly coming in and out of park. I would not recommend it at all. Totally over priced even though I booked 12 months in advance directly with the park. It did not look like the photos. Over priced and totally disappointing. Unfortunately nothing positive to say here. I did bring it up with the manager and was told there is nothing he can do he was booked out, not even offer a reduced rate as $380 a night for this was absolutely extreme. Very poor!
This was a discusting experience we went away for 1 day and they took our tent down we try to diccus but they didn't  let us talk
Spent 2 nights at this place. The cabin was pretty good. It just was on the older side of things inside. The bed was very solf and comfortable.

We checked into Rockhampton Discovery Park for the last 2 nights of our trip. It was a massive disappointment from the check in. The online photos look absolutely nothing like what is actually provided facility and room wise. When we got into the cabin their were ants everywhere, we get it you cant help insect problems however with the amount of them these cabins should of been put out of order until a full pest control was undertaken. We booked for a family of 6 yet the cabins only had a table and chairs for 2 people making it impossible for a family to actually sit and eat even breakfast together. Come time to sleep and we findout that the top bunk beds weren't even made. They only had an underlay over the mattresses and the rest of the bedding was at the end of the bed for us to make. I would understand if we had booked for 2 persons for these not to be made but when booked as a family of 6 these should of been made especially for the price charged per night. I would not recommend to families.
Upon letting managment know that we had left ealry due to the issues their response was far from satisfactory other than really oh that sucks hopefully we will see you back again. Extremely disappointing 😞.
I had an ensuite powered site for 1 night, and the park was very clean and well facilitated. The ensuite was lovely with great shower pressure. Definitely recommend
Beautiful park.Well maintained.  Great facilities

Discovery Parks – Rockhampton was one of my absolute favourite places to stay on our trip. From the moment we arrived, it felt safe, well-managed, and ideally located — a perfect base to explore Rockhampton and the surrounding areas.

What really stood out were the exceptional amenities. We had a private ensuite site, and it honestly felt like luxury camping at its finest. It added a whole new level of comfort — I joked that I might not be able to camp without one again (well… maybe not entirely joking!).

The park was clean, quiet, and close to everything, it had everything we needed for a relaxing stay. Highly recommended for anyone wanting that extra bit of comfort while still enjoying the camping lifestyle.

Our apartment was large and clean.
The park is well maintained and kid friendly.
It also accepts Service Dogs.
As the park is adjacent to a school access into the park is a bit slower during school drop off and pick up times.
Will definitely stay there again.

Absolutely amazing great place if you have a problem go and see them. Don’t put it on Google as I know I told him about something. They had a fixed straight away. Google can be used as slander remember only we can change what we post to be fair about what you write so watch what you say and how you choose to do it as others all around the world read and react to review’s
Best park in Rockhampton if the outside of the other parks is an indication. Clean and well presented.
Very friendly staff, excellent amenities with very little highway noise.
Decided to stay here due to wet weather. Sites large and well drained. Staff at reception lovely. Couple of men arguing in thw showers was a bit off putting. Minimal road noise.
We had a powered site with an ensuite bathroom and toilet. There were 3 stairs up into the bathroom.
Staff and sites tops.

Cannot speak highly enough of this park . Grounds are well kept and staff very friendly and helpful,. We arrived for 2 nights and decided to stay 5 and are so glad we did.We we’re upgraded to an ensuite site due to our sister in law having mobility issues and given a very good rate better than some of the previous places we have stayed at and no where near as nice.Would recommend highly.20/10

Always great service! We stayed here in our bus for couple of days as we begin our big lap and could not fault anything! Service was fantastic and overall experience was nothing shy of excellent. Thankyou so much
Well presented and friendly staff.

If I could give this place 0 star for room and service I absolutely would.

Where do I even start???

Easter weekend we drove 6 hour's to spend 3 night's here and planned for kid's to have an amazing easter weekend, well when we arrived young girl in office was lovely, and greated with chocolate eggs for the kids thought that was lovely,  but that's as far as it went.

The room is absolutely disgusting and health department will be contacted regarding it.

Mould is understatement coming out of the air-conditioning vents,  the lounge if you want to call it that was full of bodily fluids, the mattress in main room was absolutely disgusting again with bodily fluids and uncomfortable.

The bunk beds, the thin piece of rubber you would hardly call a mattress was awful, mould in shower.
Water park over run by all the local people pulling up and using it for free while paying guest miss out.

Manager refused to refund, didn't even offer to send cleaners to clean it, or change rooms, was told 8 other people checked out early also and wasn't getting refund, and if we left that's on us and no refund would be given.

We had to leave, we  couldn't Subject the kid's to this mould any longer or the kids mum as she suffers asthma and it could bring on attack badly.

We had to spend another 4 hours in car travelling easter morning and no carefactor given from management.

I will attach photos of proof for people to form their opinion/judgement on.

We will be taking this further as this is HEALTH RISK not change of mind and full refund should of been given.
We stayed in our caravan. The van sites were spacious and the facilities were clean.
Stayed here with our caravan on a powered site. Spacious site. Clean amenities. Friendly staff. Close to major shops and food. Will definitely stay here again.
Wifi is a bit lacking in the rooms and not all the TV's are smart TV's but other then those minor issues is a lovely place staff are welcoming and helpful

We book the same cabin #154 every year for the last 5 years of RockyNats. Great park and great location but please please please fix the bloody hot water situation in the shower. It has a maximum 10 seconds of water before it’s stone cold. I complain about this every year. Please give me a pleasant surprise for my return next year and fix the problem or move me to a better cabin and let someone else complain for the next 5 years.

We stayed here for 5 nights recently for Rockynats05. We where in a deluxe 2 bedroom cabin, with myself, husband and 2 teenage children.

I chose the park due to the ability to park our entrant car and everyday car right beside our cabin.

We thoroughly enjoyed our stayed here.  The park is close to a major shopping centre and a short drive into the city centre.

Our cabin was the perfect size for our family.

There is plenty to do on-site for the kids, hire peddle go-karts, swim in one of the 2 pools or run around in the water park. There is a games room as well and tennis courts. The park also means kids can bring their own scooters and bikes to ride around on.

We will be staying again and recommending the park to friends and family.

Booked this place for Rocky Nats a year ago through Booking.com (price per room doubled over this weekend).  I tried to cancel due to being unable to travel after surgery but was an hour too late and lost the 50% deposit ($420). Got in contact with the park direct and was told a refund was out of the question. My husband decided he would travel on his own to save losing the money so I let them know this and was then told that because I'd pressed Cancel, we would have to make another booking and pay again. She claimed there was absolutely nothing she could do for us and blamed Booking.com. We demanded a call back from management, which never came. Absolutely shocking treatment and wouldn't pass the pub test any day of week.

Will not stay again. We were put in a Unit, the shower had mold. It was way down front and the traffic all night was very loud. There were no tables and chairs inside. . The lounge was terrible. To watch tv you had to lay in bed. The room with bunk beds was so dusty.very disappointed. The pillows had stuffing coming out and doona was torn. We tried to get a unit for one night for my sister n husband and was told it was booked out. No, they kept a room opposite us, as the Fire Alarm in our apartment was going off.

Loved our stay here the owners were very accommodating giving us an empty site to park our car and camper on as we only needed 1 night.
The cabin was perfect very spacious  bed was comfy as.

Highly recommend this location for family’s,
My kids loved the pools, waterpark ,go carts and cooking on the bbq. Rooms are very clean. Every staff member works very hard to keep the park tidy. Massive shopping complex located walking distance from park
Very safe environment for children.

We recently stayed here and were pleasantly surprised with an upgrade to a 3-bedroom apartment (we travelled for a funeral so it was a welcomed surprise). The apartment was clean and spacious and provided all of the necessary facilities. Our children loved the water park (it is the reason we booked this accommodation) and we look forward to staying again next month.
We spent one night, and it was really perfect, amenities, camp kitchen, are very clean and useful. Thanks
Room great, pool great, free wifi did not work from our room due to having a hairs breath of a bar, would recommend asking staff before booking if your room will actually have usable wifi.
Arrived late but staff were helpful in providing info for us to get to our powered site. We took an en-suite site and the en-suite was super clean! Looked almost brand new.
Spacious caravan sites, good clean amenities and laundry

We stayed here for one night recently, in a standard studio unit. It was spacious, clean and very comfortable. We had a few hours after we arrived to use the water park and pool, which the kids loved. The water park and pool is on the older and smaller side, but was still a great time. We would definitely stay here again.

Stay at the Discovery Park Rockhampton, place was great, bed comfy. Birds were amazing to see and hear. Great waterpark| ****BUT DONT BOOK THROUGH EXPEDIA as they overcharge you in USA $$ to book in AUS online website and then charge more than what it cost to stay the night + Taxes*** |Will visit again but book through reception,
Great price, water park is excellent for kids and adults, beautiful and clean area and amenities
Wifi unfortunately doesn’t work you’ll have to use your mobile data.
Marsha was terrific. Great service. Thanks

Don't bother coming here if you have kids. The locals come and use all the facilities that you initially drew you to the park. My kids were unable to use the pools, games room, water splash park due to the ammount of locals harbouring the joint. Why pay good money to stay some where when anyone can use and abuse.

Pool has no shade at all over the water. Can't really get in till shade from a tree comes over about 4pm and then only in the top corner unless you want to burn. Only a step ladder to get out so if you are not physically able to climb a ladder you can't use the pool.

Thank you for the stay, the wifi coverage was unfortunately not that great - you will need to keep close to reception to keep your connection. Great waterpark/pool, games room could be doing with a few more tabletop games. Happy with our accomodation.

Overall happy and good experience with powered site for our Jayco Sean outback
The only thing that let down the 5star rating was pools are in need of repair
And abit more shade covering pool areas and would be great park
Stayed there for a night. Didn't have hot water, but it was nice regardless.
Amazing toilet facilities  per lot safe n secure at night everyone nice. In our own caravan
We stayed in this cabin and noticed lovely Jamie that works there, I forgot my info paper for the gate and she helped me out without having to drive back to cabin, always a nice helpful smile.
Great park  clean amenities and friendly staff.
Best reside i have been
Jolie cabine fonctionnelle et propre, personne accueillant, mais pourquoi donc s’être installé en pleine zone industrielle alors qu’il y aurait tant d’autres possibilités plus « glamour » ?

We are a big family in a 4 bunk caravan, and the staff were amazing. Lovely ladies on the front counter, super friendly, the water park was awesome, kids had a blast. We stayed on ensuite site which was nice, clean and roomy sites. Definitely be back again!

We stayed in this wonderful park for just one night, but we had a great time! The park is clean and well-maintained. There is plenty of space for parking caravans and motorhomes. Everything is well thought out. The laundry and facilities are in excellent condition. The staff is very friendly. We didn't expect to enjoy this park so much! I definitely recommend it.

Plenty of room on the powered site, van had concrete strips to park on, a slab for the awning and concrete strips for the car at the side. Staff friendly and amenities very clean.
Water park looked amazing.

Awesome park in Rockhampton Great staff Clean amenities 2 pools and water park
Booked for a week and have extended to 2 weeks
1.3km walk to shopping centre

We verbleven in een van de luxueuze 3 kamer huisjes. Het was perfect met airco in elke kamer, een vaatwasser en oven in de keuken en zelfs een wasmachine en droger. Echt alles wat je nodig hebt voor een heerlijke vakantie.

We kwamen laat aan, maar dat is geen probleem aangezien alles wat je nodig hebt om in te checken in een kluis wordt gedaan en de code daarvoor via sms wordt gestuurd.
A great park to stay, very clean amenities, nice friendly helpful staff

What an exceptional stay. |Staff is  very friendly and make you feel at home from the second you walk through the door. ||Room was spotless. And the houskeeping staff  was excellent and very helpful always smiling and waiving when I walk past. |Feels like coming home.

Everything was exeptional.
Staff went above and beyond.
Will definitely be back.

I’ve been staying in Rocky frequently for the past four years and this is by far the best place in the city. Secure, well looked after, helpful staff, close to everything you need. My kids have had a ball with all the things for them to do here. I can’t say enough good things. Outstanding!!

Fantastic location to the city, shopping centre, service stations etc...
Clean and fresh amenities.
Fantastic pool options, great for families.
Slightly crowded sites

Lovely park and great staff.
Thanks so much for extending our stay and shuffling things around so we could get our car fixed.
We really appreciated your help.
Just arrived & feel comfortable. Nice park with bunch of facilities

Stopped for a night and the ladies at reception were really friendly, happy and helpful. Good site, nice and big (we had a premium) very well thought out with a private little firepit area. Amenities were oldish but very clean and spacious. Thanks for a great overnight stop.

Would give more stars, but we were not made aware of the whole park being smoker friendly. Strange given how kid friendly the park is. Unfortunately we won't be using Discovery Parks again due to this.

There was plenty of room for our van and I booked well in advance but was put what I would class as the emergency spots it was terrible, spoke to another couple and they did the same to them, they were not happy either, pool was not the cleanest , left after 1 night 🤬

Over the last 4 years I've spent almost an entire year at Discovery Parks Rockhampton.  Staff have always been fantastic and whenever something has been needed they've been happy to help.
Rooms have been great.  The studio rooms are good for singles or a couple. There is a stove and microwave and while you won't be cooking a gourmet meal you'll be able to cook just fine.
The deluxe cabins are a step up with a separate room for kids to sleep and better cooking options.
Their small motel style rooms are fine for a night or two or if you're on a budget, but not the most comfortable.
Water Park is open 7 days and kids will love it.  These last school holidays the park put on a petting zoo, blocked off road areas for pavement drawing, had a tennis competition.
If you're near the main road it can be noisy as Rocky locals seem to think it's a drag strip.  We've also had instances of people jumping the fence trying to steal things.  It was reported to park management and police and the park is installing new fencing, cameras, lighting and upgrading security on the cabins.  Staff and management really do help a lot.

I called this park to see if they had accommodation for my caravan for a nights stay only to have spoken to a lady by the name of Debbie. Debbie was very friendly lovely nature over the phone infact she went above & beyond explaining about our credits as we happened to be members credits we weren’t aware of Debbie takes great pride in her job & her knowledge is very appreciated happy customers thanks to Debbie keep up the great work because of your service it brings customers back 👍 love discovery parks carnt fault 😉

Great park with a fantastic waterpark! Stayed on a powered site with a fire pit and gorgeous fairy lights. Tons of room for our 29 foot motorhome, magical at night by the fire. Walking distance to public transport and local shops. Staff are exceptional especially the ground keepers. Highly recommend!

Splash park and pools are all fantastic with lots of seating and shaded areas to sit and watch. Our site was huge. Unfortunately our bike was cut off the back of our van in the early hours of the morning so my advice is LOCK UP YOUR BIKES. Office staff helpful but has left a sour taste on our visit.
We stopped in with our van coming back from Airlie. Booked one night, ended up staying 2. Nothing fancy, but location is great, amenities and laundry was clean.

Stayed on a powered site.
Dog was welcome,  advised my mother had a disability,  we were situated right across from the amenities, laundry room for the days we were there.
Will definitely visit again, on our return trip.
All the staff were welcoming,  offering assistance when asked.
Kids Water Park is the added bonus of those travelling with children.

We stopped in on our way through too Bowen and we absolutely enjoyed our stay. We even got upgraded to a bigger room! The water play and pools are like a mini Wet ‘N’ Wild ( on the Gold Coast ). Overall excellent place to stay with or without children!! It’s great!
Friendly park. Good, clean amenities. Close to all shops and easy access to everything Rockhampton and surrounds had to offer. We really enjoyed our (week) stay here
We only stayed 1 night as we passed through. We had a powered ensuite site and it was perfect. The park is really well set out, had an excellent camp kitchen and was really impressive.
Nice park with great facilities

I requsted politely a coffie sachets (on my 7th. Day ), she rudely chased me away. Told me to go and wait, she never came, ( i can see coffie tray on her trolly) i found her name was Janet, get rid  her. People who work in the office were very nice.
I am a coustomer who paid nearly 1200 dollars to hear this. One person can ruin the reputation of this place, after an hour, i saw another lady accros the road, approched her, she was very polite and gave me the coffie, and i got the name of the person who was doing room 23 as janet(more info: i was in room21, she was cleaning room23 on 9th Aug morning) management apologised ,i am quite happy to hear from them, looks like 99%of the people are very nice her. Thanks to Tracy
We had an ensuite site. Was great.

$40.50 members price.
Tidy park with clean amenities lots of facilities for families.
Need a couple of G'days flags on the roads edge to mark the entrance as it is hard to see.
We would stay again

absolutely love coming here. we have stayed here multiple times for work purposes and holidays and never had any kinds of problem. recently spent just over 3 weeks staying at the park while we waited for our new house to finalise and everyone were brilliant the caretakers knew us by name and always waved and said gday. huge thankyou to greg and mick for looking out for us. highly recommend

대로변에 있어 접근성이 좋은 홀리데이파크
Ensuite 사이트에 묵었는데 시설이 깨끗했다.
키친도 굿.

Fantastic caravan park. Always clean. Pool is heated. Staff and very friendly, grounds keepers are very helpful. Firepit sites are a fantastic idea and we really enjoyed the space.
The park backs onto a school. A bit of noise from sporting events from 4 till 6 but not overly obtrusive.

Definitely recommend staying here!
Great sites  clean amenities friendly staff   fun water park and pools, great location
Great place

The cabin (no. 142) was spacious, clean and comfortable, and suitable for our needs.
There were a couple of minor issues:
- The shower head and one of the washbasin taps were leaking.
- the upholstery of the sofa is so worn that the under layer fabric can be seen.
Apart from the above issues we were happy with the cabin.

Stayed here for several weeks on an ensuite site. Loved the park great facilities. Shops within walking distance. Park is  Dog friendly.   The weekly clean of the ensuite was really good. 😀 Staff and grounds people are super friendly. Would definitely stay again.
Polite friendly staff

This is the first stop on our holiday north and we arrived late which was okay because I rang ahead and they had left us our information in their safe at the front of the park. Our site was easy to locate so we set up for the night. The amenities was absolutely brilliant as the showers were so nice and hot. It was great as it was pretty cold when we had arrived. The park is located in a great location and is easy accessible to getting out and exploring the city of Rockhampton. If we are ever heading north again, we would be more than happy to stay at this park in the future.
Lovely, and very helpful staff , pet friendly

I stayed at this park for one week and the amenities were clean, and the camp kitchen was good. It had many swimming pools and activities for children.
The staff were unhelpful and when we needed advice in setting up our camper trailer for the first time, they preferred to drive around the park in their golf carts saying that they were too busy.
The desk staff were quite unfriendly and unapproachable so we preferred to stay away from the office.
Good caravan park with excellent facilities, with unhelpful staff.
I recommend this caravan park if you have children.

Staff are so friendly and helpful, Kerrie & Deb went above and beyond to make our stay great, plus had a return unscheduled trip and they set us up with a room on short notice. Rooms are awesome, clean and spacious. A definite place to both stay or cut the trip heading south 😊
Recently stayed in a powered site. Great friendly service. Clean amenities. Wide sites for caravan, awning and car.
Great park awsome staff a must stay

Our 7 night stay was awesome.
Can not fault anything with this park.
We stayed in a cabin, it was very modern, super clean and tidy.
The beds were some the comfiest beds we have used.
The staff were so helpful, happy and very accommodating.
Can't wait to bring our family back here.
Thanks so much
John and Louise

Best park we've stayed at so far!|Great size sites so we didn't have an issue with our large van. It's a great set up and is well maintained.|We paid extra for the ensuit. New, fresh and looks great 🤗|Our friends paid extra and stayed at a Deluxe site at the back of the park. Wow. Loooads of room, fireplace to themselves and a string of lights surrounding the area for a pretty night.|The kids had a smile on their face, loving the well maintained waterplay area, and also the pools (not heated but warm enough).|The only negative was the games room.|Kids have wrecked everything and all you could do was watch tv.|Love to return as often as we can 🤗|Thankyou
Was only a quick o/night stay so not a lot of time to judge but overall it was comfortable.
Surely the best caravan park in Rockhampton. The best staff & amenities by far

I recently stayed in a cabin for three nights whilst working in the area, and found the cabin to be exceptionally clean, convenient and an excellent short stay option. ||I didn’t use any of the amenities but noticed they had a great water park, a couple of pools and some good bbq areas. ||I would think that if trying to get a van on site it might be a bit tight with parking, and departure time seemed to be a bit of a traffic jam, but other than this park was a lovely spot to stay and seems like it is great for cabins and/or sites
Great park ensuite sites very clean all facilities great will definitely be back here.

A Discovery park is usually good quality and this one doesn’t disappoint |It was really busy but the place was quiet and the sites roomy|There is security on the gate|Amenities are well cared for with plenty of hanging room for clothes |Check out the Thai food van on certain nights
Lovely helpful staff. Excellent location
$32 a night powered sites  nice clean park  good value 👌
Wow what an awesome park & super affordable we stayed here four nights & I'm sure we will be back again on the return trip
The rooms were clean and nice but the beds I found were not comfortable at all
Clean enjoyable stay

We stayed 3 nights here on the way north.  Booked a Ensuite site and it was excellent. Very clean and modern facilities, with 2 admin blocks that provide plenty of showers and toilets  The park is well laid out  with easy access to all sites.  Considering it is on the main route north it is quiet, apart from the birds at sunset.  The staff were very friendly and helpful.  Being a G'day member I went to get some ice for the esky and it was free! Bonus, plus the discount on bookings.  I always thought Rockhampton was dry and dusty as I only came here for Exercise when in the Army, and never really go to see the town and surrounding areas, but it is nice to say that it is clean  and very tidy.
Fantastic park, friendly workers which nothing was any trouble with request.

Family freindly environment, clean facilities and great staff. Reception staff informed me of the event date change for the next year and adjusted our booking with no hassle. The park is easily accessible and easy parking insite.
Well.Organised Caravan /Camping/Unit  Park
Love this place! Staffs were very friendly and helpful. The room was clean, neat , beds comfortable and very quiet at night. Felt very safe.

Cleanest caravan park I have visited in one month roadtrip.
Has 2 pools, a tennis court, like 6 BBQ areas, 2 kitchens and a playground for children.
Walking distance from supermarkets, gym and a Park.
Also it is very quiet and the people at reception are nice.
Definetly raccommanded
The girls on the desk are fantastic go out of there way to make our stop better each time and the grounds people look after the grounds in great shape
Great place very clean staff very keen to help

A great well maintained caravan park with cabins and hotel rooms.
Big caravan sites, well layed out, and good amenities blocks too.
Very friendly staff, from the admin team to the cleaners and groundsmen, they were always willing to help with any small issues that arose during our extended stay there.
The water park and 2 pools at the front of the park were a hit with the families and visitors.

Fantastic experience all round. Park has plenty of options and is well set out. All facilities and amenities are neat, tidy and clean. A big shout out to Kerri on the front desk who assisted me change bookings (twice). All staff were a delight to deal with and so helpful throughout our stay.
Love g'day parks
Friendly staff and good service.
Well located, super clean private bathroom. There is a pool we haven't used but seems nice. We were there for a night moving up north. It was a nice stop.
Staff are very helpful, our booking got upgraded for free to an ensuite site and now I'm not sure I could ever book a regular site again

Decided to stay here on the way back from Cairns for 2 nights. No security park was trashed by teenagers (apparently Rockhampton is known for) 2 bikes of ours stolen their own worker on site saw these teenagers running amuck and nothing was done. This place needs security not only for the people who stay but also for the park itself. Fire extinguishers thrown across the park the park's own swimming pools were trashed and damaged (closed the following day) just a total mess. One advice lock everything up!

Love this holiday park! Friendly staff, grounds are always very well kept. I've only ever camped so can't review rooms but I love that they have the option to have ensuite powered sites! The pools and water park are amazing. Will always come back here for a holiday!
Really lovely deluxe sites with fire pit area.
Couldn't log in to free WiFi by apple or samsung phones. Wifi name wasn't appearing on Wi-Fi list
Just here for the waterpark and pools. Kids enjoyed it. Could have had more covered seating
Great family spot. We had a camping site but we were still allowed to use the facilities and my boys loved the pools, waterpark, basketball courts and gaming room.
Debbie at Reception was amazing.  Fantastic service.  If l still had my business l would poach her as my Receptionist.

Stopped overnight at a RV powered site which had plenty of room and we paid extra for an ensuite which had excellent new amenities. The waterpark is a feature and ideal for families while there were shops nearby to get food or drink. The tariff was a bit high, but being peak season, it was worth the cost. Overall, a great place to stay.
Xmas time. Wonderful place, great staff and the young kids will absolutely love it. What better way to cool down than  in the park’s water park. Quiet at night, and a hive of activity during the day.
Great park. Clean amenities. Nice grassy sites. Friendly and helpful staff

Parked our campervan here for one night.   Good amenities, clean, friendly staff, safe environment, WiFi average at best but that's not a big deal for us. Kids pool/splash area looked great! Would definitely recommend!
Family friendly, clean, well thought out and comfortable. This is our second stay and will certainly be back again!

From before we even walked into reception the staff at discovery parks were fantastic. They were efficient and timely over the phone and email leading up to our stay. We just checked in to a huge 3 bedroom self contained cabin. Clean and with all the facilities you could need. The rooms were cooled perfectly and the beds made for us already. (Super soft and comfy beds). Can’t wait to try out the water playground, pools, tennis court, basketball ring, bikes and kids room. Close to the shops but quiet enough to hear the birds chirp. We will definitely be back. Thank you Tracey, Jamie and Marsha.

Ok positive the staff where friendly the showers and laundry are very clean and tidy. Where the caravans are the grass needs mowing and whipper snipered.. Around the pools need attention and mowing. The staff need to show people where to park on a caravan sit as we had to advise people where to park. The sun chairs need cleaning. Pool also needs a clean.Water park was fun great for kids.

We booked in to the cabins at Rockhampton, previously we have stayed at multiple discovery parks and always loved it.
After checking in we went to our room, first let down was the exterior cleanliness, upon opening the doors we seen black mould all over the ceiling & air conditioning didn’t work.
We then went to reception and advised of the mould & air conditioning not working. The staff was understanding & said they could change our cabin but again air conditioning didn’t work.
Paying $260 a night you would expect at a minimum working air conditioning especially in 28+ heat.
We then had to drive a further 300 kms for alternative accommodation.
Also to top it off, the water park has all the locals there with their kids, we couldn’t use the facilities even if we wanted to as every seat was taken by locals that pay to use the water park rather then for the paying guests.
VERY, Very disappointing.
Won’t be back!
Nice pool toilets nice and clean

Stayed here for a night on a overnight ensuite site and the site and the park was of top quality and will be back
Highly recommended 🤗
Great set up for teams or families travelling together and also options for families travelling alone.

Not all staff are friendly, kid friendly park with the waterpark would be good to have a playground for the littlies and out the back of the motel rooms is a grassed area (grass is dead) would be great to green up so kids have some space to run around
Caravan sites were great bird life was amazing security was fantastic pick of all the parks in Rocky will definitely be back

Good location, has street noise but what do you expect for a city. Amazing bbq and kids aqua park. The front staff were top level. The sites (at least my row) were very tight for van, saw two attempt and leave.
We loved this park thank you for making us feel so welcome

Honestly the ensuite caravan area was amazing; very spacious. The pool was lovely though a bit dirty due to all the birds though honestly i couldnt care less after a 30° day the pool was what I needed. Biggest issue is the wifi. One family member could access the 300mbs download speed but after 7pm not enough signal for all members in the park leading to the wifi to not accept new devices. My laptop and phone both couldn't connect due to the low speed left available.

We had an amazing 3 night stay 😀
Cabin was clean and spacious, pools and watepark amazing!!
Eldest loved the basketball court and staff were very friendly

Was amazing,clean and tidy.
Friendly and inviting.
Great place to stay
Can't comment on rooms as we have day visits for water park use. Great for the kids.

What an amazing park! The kids had an amazing time as did we! The pool and water park areas were a massive hit 😁 the admin staff are absolutely amazing and highly accommodating. We didn't realise we had booked the powered site with a private fire pit. 🔥 I would highly recommend this place to anyone travelling to Rockhampton.

We just had 5 amazing days here while travelling for a wedding. Staff were absolutely amazing and so friendly

Water park was loads of fun for the kids and also us adults.

Super convenient and close to absolutely everything

Only negative is room never got serviced.
Had to go to reception several times for fresh towels

But overall this was a fantastic park and we will definitely be back
Awesome weekend service

Can't speak of the cabins but the sites are all a generous size, all with slabs, somw with private bathrooms and some even with a fire pit and fairy lights.
A very busy park but it is quiet and a good place to relax. Camp kitchen is very clean and tidy with all things you need to cook up a storm. Bathrooms, while dated are very clean with spacious showers amd hot hot water! The 'baby room' was very handy, having a toilet and a basin big enough to bathe two young children.
The playground could do with an improvement/upgrade as it is quite small. But the water park and pools are great, with one pool even heated.
Service was wonderful, we arrived a day ahead of schedule and they were able to make room for us. We ended up staying an extra night!
It's our go to caravan park when we are in Rocky!
Big park with plenty of room. Excellent facilities. Very clean. These Kiwis eill return!
Stayed in the caravan park, so no comment on the rooms. The caravan sites were spacious and well kept. Amenities quite good.
Nice pool,warm today👍 ,great waterpark
Beautiful ensuites and pools.
Very safe, quiet, well maintained park.
Well laid out van park. The sites were easy to access and level, and nice and sunny on a winter afternoon!
Great park and very clean
Clean, quiet, practical.
This was a pit stop for us, only spent one night but we were happy with where we were located on the park. The amenities are dated but honestly very clean!
Nice clean and tidy caravan park, clean amenities. Good place for a stop over in Rockhampton. Definitely would stay again.
Those guys just close at 5pm and dont take new arrivals. Seem to have enough money.

Had a caravan site. Warm welcome on arrival with great explanation of the park and nearby.  Van parking can be tight to back into. Our van is 23ft and our neighbours car was out for the day so not too difficult. We walked around and out the back was large private areas with you own firepit and grass area. Upgade would be an option next time! Amenities/laundry very clean. Large pool and water ground play area for the children. Great park.
Really lovely park. Fantastic for kids with the water park and pools. Friendly staff and definitely somewhere I’d stay again.

This park was easy to find. Every shop you could want is within a 5-minute drive. It's a quick drive to Yeepoon and the beautiful beaches.
The park has great amenities. Our Ensuite was new, very clean, and well laid out.
If we had small kids, this place would be wonderful for them with many activities for them. Even the teenagers here were having fun last night playing basketball.
I will definitely stay here again.
